settings.support_note: Start with the balanced everyday fit unless portability or a permanent desk is clearly the bigger priority.

settings.heading: Pick the EZQuest fit for how you work
settings.copy: See the difference in portability, desk presence, ports, and power. When the choice is close, begin with the balanced everyday fit and adjust only if portability or a permanent desk clearly leads.
settings.source_note: Pick the fit. Start with the balanced everyday option when the choice is close. Use compatibility or support only when one last detail still needs confirming.

settings.heading: One last check?
settings.copy: Compatibility is close. Expert help is here for unusual setups.
